title: Iranian official: deal with Trump 'no longer feasible at this stage' — blames Beirut strike; FM calls it 'self-defense'
snippet: An Iranian official linked to the negotiations told media that 'a deal with President Trump is no longer feasible at this stage,' blaming Trump for the current situation and escalation in Lebanon. Iran's foreign ministry characterized the Beirut strike as a 'ceasefire violation' and said Iran exercised 'self-defense' in launching missiles at Israel. This is a direct contradiction to Trump's claim of being 'very close' to a deal. Sources: MS NOW, CBS News, 파이낸셜뉴스.
tag_reason: New statement from Iranian official explicitly declaring deal 'no longer feasible' — first such public declaration from talks-linked official
